merge_dependabot.description: Review and merge open Dependabot PRs

create_release.description: Create GitHub Release with tag + changelog

add_tests.description: Add test suites for untested modules

notes: Run 3182-3183: perf_improvement on FeedReader (single-pass tokenizer in FeedSentimentRadar + eliminated redundant title re-tokenization in analyze()). readme_overhaul on sauravcode (fixed builtin count 95/105→124, added TOC and Docker section).
previousNotes: Run 3180-3181: refactor on FeedReader (migrated 9 files from inline JSONEncoder/JSONDecoder to shared JSONCoding instances — eliminated ~30 redundant allocations, -107/+33 lines). create_release on gif-captcha (v1.16.0 — CAPTCHA Mutation Lab genetic algorithm tool, shared-utils stats deduplication).
previousPreviousNotes: Run 3164-3165: security_fix on WinSentinel (closed call-operator & variable-exec bypass in InputSanitizer — CallOperatorPattern now catches &(expr) and &$var, added VariableExecPattern for variable-assignment-then-invoke). create_release on GraphVisual (v2.59.0 — Interactive Motif Census with significance testing).
previousPreviousPreviousNotes: Run 3162-3163: perf_improvement on sauravcode (O(1) type-dispatch for compile_statement in sauravcc.py — replaced 19-branch isinstance chain with dict lookup, matching existing compile_expression pattern). refactor on agenticchat (consolidated 14 manual JSON.parse/stringify calls across 10 modules to use centralized SafeStorage.getJSON/setJSON API).
previousPreviousPreviousPreviousNotes: Run 3160-3161: perf_improvement on VoronoiMap (parallel coord arrays in _voronoi_areas + inlined k-means distance in _obj_cluster_balance of vormap_swarm.py). security_fix on gif-captcha (bounded blockIP/allowIP stores with maxBlockedIPs/maxAllowedIPs caps to prevent CWE-400 memory exhaustion in geo-risk-scorer.js).
previousPreviousPreviousPreviousPrevious: Run 3156-3157: perf_improvement on agentlens (single-pass peak_utilization O(5n)→O(n) + reuse _compute_all_trends in detect_bottlenecks eliminating redundant cpu_vals extraction). merge_dependabot on gif-captcha — no open PRs found, re-rolled to create_release on agentlens (v1.50.0 — Capacity Planner & SLA Evaluator Performance).
